name: request_human_confirmation
description: Surface an action to a staff member for them to complete in the source system. Swoop does not book, charge, send, or modify state — humans do. This tool shows the staff member the action, the context, and a confirm button. The agent receives a confirmation_id immediately and the handoff.confirmed event fires when the staff member acts.

expected_completion.description: ISO 8601 timestamp or descriptor like 'within 15 minutes'
